zh.lifeSummary: 當Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I於1170年出生在法國時，他的父親Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III35歲，母親Mathilde de Garlande21歲。他和Mahaut de Poissy至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1209年登記服兵役。他去世於1226年9月20日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯阿維尼享年56歲，埋葬在法國瑟-吉瓦馬勒-哈梅奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I于1170年出生在法国时，他的父亲Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III35岁，母亲Mathilde de Garlande21岁。他和Mahaut de Poissy至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他于1209年登记服兵役。他去世于1226年9月20日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯阿維尼享年56岁，埋葬在法国瑟-吉瓦馬勒-哈梅奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bouchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Michel, Normand, Pierre, Cecile, Gilles, Lucien, Alphonse, Jacques, Alain.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Burchard, composed of the elements burg ‘protection’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

French: in some cases, possibly also a nickname for someone with a big mouth (in either a literal or figurative sense), from bouche ‘mouth’ + the pejorative suffix -ard. Compare Buschor , Bushard , Bushaw , and Bushor .

variants.name: Bushard
meanings: Possibly, in some cases, also an Americanized form of German Buschard (see Bushart 2).

variants.name: Buschor
meanings: Swiss German: probably a Germanized form of French   Bouchard  . Compare   Buschur   and   Bushor  .

variants.name: Bushore
meanings: Americanized form of French Bouchard , reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. Compare Bushor .

en.lifeSummary: When Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I was born in 1170, in France, his father, Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III, was 35 and his mother, Mathilde de Garlande, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mahaut de Poissy. He registered for military service in 1209. He died on 20 September 1226, in Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Magny-les-Hameaux, Seine-et-Oise, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I est né en 1170, à France, son père, Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Garlande, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Mahaut de Poissy. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1209. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1226, à Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Magny-les-Hameaux, Seine-et-Oise, France.

de.Berre: Berre-l'Étang, Istres, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I 1170 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III 35 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Garlande 21. Er hatte mit Mahaut de Poissy mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1209 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 20. September 1226 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich und wurde in Magny-les-Hameaux, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I è nato il nel 1170 nel Francia, il suo padre, Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Garlande, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Mahaut de Poissy. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1209. Morì il 20 settembre 1226, nel Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Magny-les-Hameaux, Seine-et-Oise, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly Iが1170年にフランスで生まれた時，父Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly IIIは35歳，母Mathilde de Garlandeは21歳であった。彼はMahaut de Poissyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1209年に兵役登録をした。彼は1226年9月20日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼアヴィグノンで56歳で死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼマグニー-レス-ハムアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Berre: 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 이스트레스 베레-'e탠그
ko.lifeSummary: Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I(이)가 1170년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Garlande(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mahaut de Poissy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1209년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1226년 9월 20일 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바클루스 아비뇰에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 매그니-레스-함이스에 묻혔다.

pt.Berre: Berre-l'Étang, Istres, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I nasceu em 1170, em França, seu pai, Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Garlande, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Mahaut de Poissy. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1209. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1226, em Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Magny-les-Hameaux, Seine-et-Oise, França.

ru.Berre: бирре-л'eтанг, истресь, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I родился в 1170 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Garlande, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Mahaut de Poissy. В 1209 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 20 сентября 1226 г. в местности авигнон, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности магни-лес-хамокс, сине-ет-оис, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly I nació en 1170, en Francia, su papá, Mattheus Van Montmorency Heer Van Marly III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Garlande, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Mahaut de Poissy. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1209. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1226, en Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Magny-les-Hameaux, Seine-et-Oise, Francia.
